top_signals.title: Meta jumps into AI coding market in effort to chase Anthropic and OpenAI
top_signals.summary: Meta is upgrading its Muse Spark artificial intelligence model under the leadership of AI chief Alexandr Wang.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: June home sales disappoint as prices reach an all-time high
top_signals.summary: Home sales dropped in June month over month as mortgage rates remain stubbornly high. Prices hit an all-time high.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong SFC orders crypto platforms, online brokers to phase out OTP logins
top_signals.summary: Hong Kong SFC orders internet brokers, crypto platforms to replace OTP logins with passkeys within 12 months following 57% spoofing surge.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
